$schema: Design system for WhatsApp SaaS — AI replication guide. Consume runtime values (colors, theme, logo) from branding.ts.
brandingSource: All colors, theme, logo, and white-label values MUST be imported from branding.ts. Never hardcode these in components.
designPrinciples: Professional and enterprise-grade: trustworthy, focused, no playful or consumer whimsy.
Compact information density: fit more on screen without feeling cramped; Slack/Notion-like density.
Slack and Notion as north stars: clean, minimal, purposeful, warm neutrals, subtle depth.
Consistency over novelty: reuse components and tokens; avoid one-off styles.
Accessibility first: WCAG 2.1 AA contrast, 44×44px minimum touch targets, semantic HTML, keyboard navigation.
White-label ready: every visual token (colors, fonts, logo) resolvable from branding.ts.

structure.layout: Hybrid: top app bar (brand, search, user) + collapsible sidebar for main navigation.

sidebar.position: Left, collapsible. Icon-only when collapsed, icon + label when expanded.
sidebar.content: Top: logo + app name. Main: Dashboard, Chat, Campaigns, Contacts, AI Agent. Bottom: Settings.

topBar.height: 56px. Contains: breadcrumb or title, global search, notifications, user avatar/menu.

mainContent.padding: 24px default. Full-bleed for Chat. Constrained max-width (e.g. 720px) for chat thread; flexible for Dashboard, Campaigns, Contacts.

usage.tight: 4–8px: list items, table cells, inline elements.
usage.medium: 12–16px: card padding, form groups, button groups.
usage.relaxed: 24–32px: section gaps, modal padding, major blocks.

typography.primary: Inter — body, labels, tables, form copy.
typography.heading: Plus Jakarta Sans — headings only; fallback to primary if not loaded.

colors.description: Semantic roles. Actual values in branding.ts. Use only these tokens in UI.

semantic.primary: Primary actions, links, selected nav, outbound chat. branding.colors.primary

designStyle.aesthetic: Clean, minimal, purposeful. Slight warmth in neutrals. No decorative flair. Professional and compact.

shadows.sm: Subtle elevation for cards at rest.

designStyle.borders: 1px, color from branding.colors.border. No thick or double borders.

iconography.stroke: 1.5–2px; match surrounding text color or semantic color.

button.variants: primary (bg-primary), secondary (border, transparent bg), ghost (transparent), destructive (error).
button.sizes: sm, md, lg. Padding and height from spacing.componentPadding.
button.radius: 6px. Font: medium for primary, normal for secondary/ghost.

input.border: 1px solid border token. Focus: ring 2px primary/20.

components.select: Match input height and radius. Chevron 16px. Options: surfaceElevated, 8px padding.
components.checkbox: 16×16 or 18×18. 4px gap to label. Check: primary. Border: border token.
components.toggle: Track: 40×24 or 44×24. Thumb: primary when on. Accessible: 44×44 touch.

card.border: 1px border or subtle shadow-sm. Hover: optional shadow-md for interactive cards.

drawer.side: Right typical. Width: 380–420px. Same surface as modal; radius on inner side only.

toast.position: Top-right or bottom-right. surfaceElevated, shadow-lg, 8px radius. Auto-dismiss; optional action.

table.rowHover: surface/ghost. Striped optional. Border: 1px border between rows or bottom-only.

components.chart: Muted grid (border), primary for main series, textMuted for axis/labels. Minimal ink.
components.badge: Pill radius. primaryMuted for default; success/warning/error for status. 6px 10px.
components.tabs: Underline or pill for active. 16px gap. Underline 2px primary for active.

nav.sidebarItem: 44px min height, 12px horizontal padding. Icon 20px, gap 12px to label. Active: primary or primaryMuted bg.

emptyState.icon: 48px, textMuted. Title: lg semibold. Description: sm textMuted. CTA: primary button.

components.loading: Skeleton: surface + shimmer or spinner. Spinner: primary, 24–32px. Match content shape.
components.error: Icon + title + description. Destructive or error color for icon. Retry CTA.

accessibility.contrast: WCAG 2.1 AA. Text on background ≥ 4.5:1; large text ≥ 3:1.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus ring (2px primary or outline). Never remove focus outline.
accessibility.semantic: Use button, nav, main, section, etc. aria-label on icon-only controls.

coreFlows.dashboard: Overview cards, key metrics, recent activity. Compact grid; charts and tables per designStyle.
coreFlows.chat: Conversation list (left or top on mobile) + thread. Message bubbles per components.chatBubble.
coreFlows.campaigns: List + compose. Tables and forms. Same cards and inputs.
coreFlows.contacts: List/table, filters, import. Reuse table and empty state.
coreFlows.settings: Grouped sections, toggles, inputs. Card per section.
coreFlows.aiAgent: Config form, logs/preview. Cards, inputs, optional code or log view.
